# Maintenance Report

## Description
A clear and concise description of the maintenance task.

## Maintenance Type
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Dependency updates
- [ ] Documentation updates
- [ ] Cleanup (unused code/files)
- [ ] Other (please specify):

## Impact
Explain the impact of this maintenance task (e.g., improves performance, reduces technical debt).

## Additional Context
Add any other context or details about the maintenance task here.
